item.title: ATOPALM Intensive Moisturizing Cream fórmula original crema hidratante rica suave repone la hidratación protege la piel contra daños y molestias tecnología MLE sin parabenos 100 ml 3.4 onzas
item.description: Tienes ATOPALM Intensive Moisturizing Cream fórmula original crema hidratante rica suave repone la hidratación protege la piel contra daños y molestias tecnología MLE sin parabenos 100 ml 3.4 onzas aqui! 🔎: Suitable for adults and children Aids in restoring the skin barrier Dermatologically tested Contains plant derived ingredients Helps to nourish dry, damaged skin 🛒 Comprar!!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
